pinpoint.pushtemplate.ADM.Docs: The message template to use for the ADM (Amazon Device Messaging) channel. This message template overrides the default template for push notification channels (`Default`).

pinpoint.pushtemplate.APNS.Docs: The message template to use for the APNs (Apple Push Notification service) channel. This message template overrides the default template for push notification channels (`Default`).

pinpoint.pushtemplate.Baidu.Docs: The message template to use for the Baidu (Baidu Cloud Push) channel. This message template overrides the default template for push notification channels (`Default`).

pinpoint.pushtemplate.Default.Docs: The default message template to use for push notification channels.

pinpoint.pushtemplate.DefaultSubstitutio.Docs: A JSON object that specifies the default values to use for message variables in the message template. This object is a set of key-value pairs. Each key defines a message variable in the template. The corresponding value defines the default value for that variable. When you create a message that's based on the template, you can override these defaults with message-specific and address-specific variables and values.

pinpoint.pushtemplate.GCM.Docs: The message template to use for the GCM channel, which is used to send notifications through the Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM), formerly Google Cloud Messaging (GCM), service. This message template overrides the default template for push notification channels (`Default`).

pinpoint.pushtemplate.Tags.Docs: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).

pinpoint.pushtemplate.TemplateDescriptio.Docs: A custom description of the message template.

pinpoint.pushtemplate.TemplateName.Docs: The name of the message template.
